PREFIX bd: <http://www.bigdata.com/rdf#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?representative ?representativeLabel WHERE {
  ?district wdt:P131 wd:Q54444 .
  ?representative wdt:P2917 ?district .
  ?representative p:P1129 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1129 wd:Q2204594 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
  ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(?start <= "2020-01-01" ^^ xsd:date && ?end >= "2018-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  SERVICE wikibase:label {
    bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" .
  }
}
